name: SnapGene
description: SnapGene is a useful sequence design surface inside Biotechnology.
whyUseIt: People in Biotechnology use SnapGene to make the field more visible, testable, collaborative, or operational.
beginnerMistakes: Using SnapGene as a substitute for thinking instead of a way to sharpen it.
Skipping documentation and context when sharing output from SnapGene.
